name: Roasted Red Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat BBQ to medium heat.
2. In a bowl, toss the potatoes with oil, sage and salt & pepper.
3. Roast for 20 minutes on the grill.
4. Add garlic cloves and roast an additional 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the garlic has softened.
5. Serves 6.
Note: This should be done in a roasting pan on the grill.
